title: hypochaeris glabra subsp. salzmanniana
intro: Hypochaeris glabra subsp. salzmanniana, also known as smooth cat's ear, is a subspecies of the annual plant Hypochaeris glabra, belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hypochaeris glabra subsp. salzmanniana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Traditionally, it is prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in tincture form to harness its medicinal properties.
